calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Ouray Construction, Inc. or Glade T. Holmes.
Defaults were entered against defendants on November 2, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Eulah Holmes was filed on November 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 2, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 28, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Ouray Construction, Inc., and Glade T. Holmes as follows:

Damages/Principal -$129,424.67.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,920.15.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $746.84, for a total judgment in the amount of $138,591.66.

It is further Ordered, Adjudged and Decreed that plaintiff, Bank of the West, is the owner of the leased equipment described in Attachment A to the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2009 Continued To Feb-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Off Calendar
